items.summary: Implement client-side PDF generation for payslips so that each employee's monthly payslip can be downloaded as a properly formatted PDF directly from the browser. The PDF must include all payslip sections already rendered in PayslipView.tsx: employee details (name, ID, department, designation), pay period (month/year), earnings breakdown (Basic, HRA, DA, allowances), deductions breakdown (EPF, ESI, PT, LWF, TDS, loan deductions), gross pay, total deductions, and net pay. Add a 'Download PDF' button on the PayslipView page that triggers the PDF download without requiring a backend call.
